etymology.description: semantic иЁЂ(иЁЂ) (yГЎn, 'speech') + phonetic г•Ј (yД«n) -> slow speech
etymology.interpretation: The character г•Ї combines the semantic component иЁЂ(иЁЂ) (yГЎn, 'speech'), indicating its relation to speaking, with г•Ј as the phonetic component, contributing the sound. This combination suggests the notion of speaking in a slow or deliberate manner.
